dock_tiles.label: Movies/Tv
dock_tiles.heading: Movies/Tv
dock_tiles.subheading: Your favorite movies and TV shows.
dock_tiles.description: Stream blockbusters, discover hidden gems, even experience a huge collection of stunning 4K visuals. All from the comfort of your couch. Dive into a cinematic universe with endless options, curated picks just for you, your very own library and save it to your own profile. Get ready for an immersive viewing experience like no other With the all new On Now V2!!

dock_tiles.label: Sports
dock_tiles.heading: Live Tv
dock_tiles.description: Never miss a moment with our comprehensive Electronic Program Guide, bringing you real-time updates and scheduling for all your favorite sports. From the roar of the stadium to the thrill of the finish line, ON NOW EPG ensures you're always in the know, with instant access to live broadcasts and upcoming events. Get ready to experience sports like never before, right at your fingertips.

dock_tiles.label: Music
dock_tiles.heading: Music
dock_tiles.description: Discover playlists, charts and live concerts from your favourite artists.Discover playlists, charts, and live concerts from your favourite artists. Immerse yourself in their world, exploring their musical journey and connecting with their creative spirit. Stay updated on new releases, exclusive content, and hidden gems, all while enjoying a seamless and personalised music experience.

dock_tiles.heading: Google
dock_tiles.description: Connect a keyboard and mouse and away you go..Search the web straight from your TV and explore answers, websites, videos, images, news, guides and more in seconds. Whether you’re looking up a movie, checking something quickly, or browsing the internet from the couch, Google puts the world’s information right at your fingertips.

dock_tiles.heading: YouTube No Ads
dock_tiles.description: Enjoy your favourite videos, music, podcasts, trailers and creators without annoying interruptions. Jump straight into the content you love with a cleaner, smoother viewing experience made for the big screen. Sit back, search, play and enjoy endless entertainment without the distractions.

dock_tiles.label: Apps
dock_tiles.sub: Find all your apps inside here
dock_tiles.heading: V2 App Store
dock_tiles.subheading: All the apps in one place
dock_tiles.description: Discover, install, and effortlessly manage your most cherished applications with unparalleled ease. Our distinctive app store platform is meticulously designed to streamline the entire process, simplifying both the initial installation and subsequent uninstallation procedures.
